name: Recipe Converter & Scaler
description: Convert recipes between measurement systems and scale servings

agents.name: Recipe Converter
agents.system_prompt_hint: Convert the recipe between measurement systems (metric/imperial). Scale all ingredients proportionally to the desired serving size. Adjust cooking times and temperatures. Note ingredients that don't scale linearly (e.g., spices, leavening). Include both original and converted versions.

author: agentfactory
